name: icon
description: Inline Lucide <svg> by name, sized + coloured by --lv-* tokens. Zero JS, CSP-clean. The root PARTIAL: every partial/wire template that needs a glyph composes it via @template.lievit.icon(name=...).
docs: Copies the icon partial to your JTE root at lievit/icon.jte, reached as @template.lievit.icon(name=...). It imports a static LievitIcons.body(name) icon map: vendor your Lucide SVGs and generate that map (see registry/icons/generate-icon-map.mjs), or point the @import at your own icon-body source. The source is yours: edit the package/import freely.
